final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing traditional Chinese gongbi heavy-color painting of the "Hundred Birds Paying Homage to the Phoenix" (百鸟朝凤图).

Style/medium: traditional Chinese gongbi heavy-color painting (工笔重彩), meticulous brushwork with mineral pigments and gold leaf accents, Song dynasty court painting aesthetic, refined line work with flowing contours
Composition: panoramic scroll format, symmetrical arrangement with central focus, birds radiating outward from the center, layered depth with foreground, middle ground and distant mountains
Subject: pair of phoenixes soaring with wings spread at center — male phoenix in vermillion red, golden yellow and emerald green plumage; female phoenix in pink-purple, silver-white and cyan-blue feathers; surrounded by dozens of exotic birds including peacocks with fanned tails, dancing cranes, golden pheasants foraging, playful parrots, each bird in distinct lifelike posture
Scene/backdrop: ethereal immortal realm with mist-shrouded mountains and rosy clouds, ancient pines and verdant cypresses, exotic flowers and rare grasses scattered throughout
Lighting/mood: soft diffused celestial glow from cloud layers, auspicious and majestic atmosphere suggesting prosperity and good fortune
Color palette: rich saturated mineral pigments as base, vermillion and gold as dominant accents, complementary cool tones (cyan, purple, silver) for contrast, gold powder outlining feather details
Materials/textures: fine silk or rice paper texture, visible brushstroke precision in line work, metallic gold leaf highlights on plumage, layered color washes with opaque mineral pigments
Text (verbatim): "百鸟朝凤图"
Constraints: must preserve traditional Chinese painting proportions and compositional rules; phoenix pair must be clearly distinguished by color scheme; all bird species must be recognizable and distinct
Avoid: Western perspective distortion, photographic realism, modern digital gradients, anime or cartoon stylization, 8K stuffer terminology
